audit_items.proof_trace: sha1.c contains zero heap allocation or deallocation calls (confirmed by exhaustive grep for malloc/calloc/realloc/free — no matches). The universal quantification 'forall free(p) in sha1.c' is vacuously satisfied because the set of free() calls is empty. All memory in sha1.c is stack-allocated (local variables, stack arrays via SHA1HANDSOFF) or caller-provided; SHA1Final's memset at L195 is a security wipe, not a free().
